title: A Set of Universal Plus Flush Hood Latch and Pin Kit Hood Pin Plus Flush Mount Latch Kit Lock Black Carbon Fiber Gift Refit New Car
features: Hood Pin Plus Locking Hood Latch and Pin Kit - Black Carbon Fiber Look - Part # 120-3100.
The Material is a lightweight, high strength, glass-reinforced thermoplastic housing that contains a hinged, spring-loaded stainless steel pin.
This compact, aerodynamic assembly is the perfect modern replacement for conventional hood pins, door latches, and more. Now includes Molded Fixing Plates!
Package include A set of A Set of Universal Plus Flush Hood Latch and Pin Kit Hood Pin Plus.
Replace your favorite car with a new lock cover to make it look more cool.
